hero.title: Create digital influencers with unlimited video and image generations.
hero.subtitle: Generate ultra-realistic images, videos, and motion with just a few clicks. No studio, no models, no showing your face. Everything you need to create professional content is here.

howItWorks.title: From zero to finished content in 3 steps.
howItWorks.subtitle: You don't need experience with AI, editing, or design. The AI Model Lab does the heavy lifting for you.

step1.title: Create Your Influencer
step1.description: Pick a model from the gallery or generate a brand new persona. Define face, body, style, and personality in just a few clicks.

step2.title: Customize the Content
step2.description: Choose the scene, pose, outfit, and motion. Use our library of ready-made prompts or write your own. You have full control over every detail.

step3.title: Export and Publish
step3.description: Download high-quality images and videos, ready to post on TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, or any other network. No watermark on paid plans.

features.title: A complete platform to create content that converts.
features.subtitle: Photos, videos, motion, and editing — all with AI, all in one place.

influencers.title: AI Influencers
influencers.description: Create hyper-realistic avatars with their own face, voice, and personality. Make your influencer talk, gesture, and appear in any scene without recording anything — perfect for UGC, ads, and branded content.

motion.title: Motion Control
motion.description: Transfer motion from a reference video to any character or avatar. Perfect lip sync, synced facial expressions, and fluid gestures — control every detail of the animation like a director.

skinEnhancer.title: Skin Enhancer
skinEnhancer.description: Remove the artificial look from AI-generated images. Add realistic pores and natural skin texture with a single click.

imagesHD.title: Full HD Images
imagesHD.description: Generate professional high-definition photos with realistic lighting, cinematic composition, and crisp detail. Ideal for ads, product catalogs, social media, and any content that needs to impress on the first frame.

videos.title: Ultra-Realistic Videos
videos.description: Access the best models on the market in one place — Kling, Veo 3.1, Sora 2 Pro and more. Cinema-grade quality, natural motion, and realistic physics, without juggling five different subscriptions.

upscale.title: 4K Upscale
upscale.description: Upscale images up to 4K while preserving skin detail, lighting, and facial structure.

pricing.title: Simple plans. No surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Pick a plan and scale whenever you want. Cancel anytime.
pricing.generationFootnote: If you spend all credits on a single model
pricing.guaranteeText: Subscribe with peace of mind. You can cancel your plan anytime — no fees, no hassle — and keep full access until the end of your paid period.

socialProof.creator: Picked by 68% of creators

comparison.title: The old way is expensive. The new way costs pennies.
comparison.totalDescription: That's the monthly bill for anyone who subscribes to each of these platforms on their own. Here you get everything in a single plan — for just a fraction of that.

useCases.title: Whatever your niche. The AI Model Lab adapts to your goal.

creators.title: Content Creators
creators.desc: Post every day without showing your face. Build a persona that becomes your channel's identity and grow a real audience with AI-generated content.

sellers.title: Sellers and Affiliates
sellers.desc: Generate review, unboxing, and demo videos with virtual influencers. Scale sales on TikTok Shop, Instagram, and any platform without relying on anyone.

brands.title: Brands and Agencies
brands.desc: Produce unlimited UGC without hiring models or influencers. Cut production costs and get fresh creatives every day for your campaigns.

social.title: Social Media Managers
social.desc: Deliver more results with less time and lower cost. Create content for multiple brands using a different persona for each one.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Create your account in under 2 minutes, pick a plan starting at $2.90/mo, and you'll get your credits right away to generate images and videos. Cancel anytime — no fees, no hassle.

items.question: Do I need to install anything?
items.answer: No. The AI Model Lab runs 100% online, right in your browser. Works on desktop and mobile.

items.question: Can I use the content to sell on TikTok Shop?
items.answer: Yes. Many creators use The AI Model Lab to generate review and demo videos for TikTok Shop. Use it on any platform for any commercial purpose.

items.question: Do videos have a watermark?
items.answer: Not on paid plans. All content you generate is yours — no watermark, ready to publish.

items.question: Can I use it for paid ads?
items.answer: Yes. Images and videos you generate can be used on Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, Google Ads, and any other platform.

items.question: Is the generated content exclusive to me?
items.answer: Yes. Every generation is unique. Even with the same prompt, results differ. Your content is exclusively yours.

items.question: What happens if I run out of credits?
items.answer: You can wait for the monthly renewal or buy extra credits anytime, with no need to switch plans.

items.question: Can I cancel anytime?
items.answer: Yes. No penalties, no fees, no hassle. Cancel straight from the dashboard and keep using it until the end of your paid period.

items.question: How does voice cloning work?
items.answer: You record or upload a short sample of your voice (minimum 10 seconds) and The AI Model Lab clones it with AI. Then just write the script and your voice speaks any text, in multiple languages. You must have legal permission to clone the voice you use (yours or someone who authorized you). Each plan allows a different amount of saved voices — check the pricing table.

items.question: Can I generate audio with professional voices without cloning mine?
items.answer: Yes. We have 60+ ready-to-use voices in 15 languages (English, Portuguese, Spanish and more). Just write the text, pick a voice and the audio is ready in seconds — perfect for reels, videos, podcasts or ads.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
content: By accessing or using the AI Model Lab platform ("Platform"), available at theaimodelab.ai, you declare that you have read, understood, and fully agree with these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any provision set forth herein, you must not use the Platform.

The AI Model Lab reserves the right to change these Terms at any time, with the user being notified through the Platform or by email. Continued use after notification constitutes acceptance of the changes.

sections.title: 2. Description of Service
content: The AI Model Lab is an online platform that uses artificial intelligence technologies to generate images and videos from text commands (prompts) provided by the user. Services may include, among others:
list: Generation of static images based on text descriptions
Generation and editing of videos with artificial intelligence assistance
Tools for editing, enhancing, and customizing visual content
Temporary storage of content generated on the Platform

sections.title: 3. User Registration and Account
content: To access certain features, the user must create an account, providing true, complete, and up-to-date information. The user is fully responsible for:
list: Maintaining the confidentiality of their access credentials (login and password)
All activities carried out in their account
Immediately notifying The AI Model Lab of any unauthorized use of their account
sections.after: The AI Model Lab reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms, without prior notice.

sections.title: 4. Acceptable Use of the Platform
content: The user commits to using the Platform ethically and in compliance with applicable law. It is expressly prohibited to use the Platform to:
list: Generate content involving child pornography, exploitation of minors, or any illegal content
Create images or videos of real people without the explicit consent of those persons
Produce defamatory, discriminatory content, or content that incites violence or hatred
Generate content that violates copyrights, trademarks, or other intellectual property rights of third parties
Create deepfakes or misleading content intended to misinform or defraud
Perform reverse engineering, decompile, or attempt to access the Platform's source code
Use the Platform to send spam, phishing, or any malicious activity
Intentionally overload the servers or interfere with the operation of the Platform
sections.after: The AI Model Lab reserves the right to remove any content that violates these guidelines and to suspend or ban offending users.

subsections.title: 5.1. User-Generated Content
content: Content generated by the user through the Platform (images and videos) may be used by the user for personal and commercial purposes, according to the contracted plan and subject to applicable legal restrictions.

The user acknowledges that content generated by artificial intelligence may not be protected by copyright in all jurisdictions and that The AI Model Lab does not guarantee exclusivity over the generated content.

subsections.title: 5.2. Platform Ownership
content: The Platform, including its design, source code, algorithms, AI models, logos, trademarks, and other elements, is the exclusive property of The AI Model Lab, protected by applicable intellectual property laws.

sections.title: 6. Plans and Payments
content: The AI Model Lab may offer free and paid plans. By contracting a paid plan, the user agrees to the prices and conditions in effect at the time of contracting. The specific conditions of each plan, including generation limits, available features, and refund policies, will be described on the Platform's pricing page.
Non-payment may result in suspension of access to the features of the contracted plan.

sections.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
content: The AI Model Lab is provided "as is". To the maximum extent permitted by law, The AI Model Lab is not responsible for:
list: Temporary unavailability of the Platform or service interruptions
Content generated by artificial intelligence that may be considered inaccurate, offensive, or inappropriate
Direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of the Platform
Loss of data or content stored on the Platform
Misuse of generated content by third parties
sections.after: The user is solely responsible for their use of the content generated on the Platform.

sections.title: 8. Privacy and Data Protection
content: The processing of users' personal data is governed by our Privacy Policy, which forms an integral part of these Terms of Service. The AI Model Lab undertakes to process personal data in compliance with the Brazilian General Data Protection Law (LGPD – Law No. 13,709/2018).

sections.title: 9. Termination
content: The user may close their account at any time through the Platform's settings. The AI Model Lab may suspend or terminate the user's access at any time in the event of a violation of these Terms, without prejudice to other applicable measures.
After termination, content stored in the user's account may be permanently deleted after the retention period provided for in the Privacy Policy.

sections.title: 10. General Provisions
content: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Federative Republic of Brazil. The forum of the district of The AI Model Lab's headquarters is elected to resolve any disputes arising from these Terms, with express waiver of any other, however privileged it may be.
If any clause of these Terms is considered invalid or unenforceable, the remaining clauses will remain in full force and effect.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
content: The AI Model Lab ("we", "our", or "Platform"), available at theaimodelab.ai, values and respects the privacy of its users. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, store, share, and protect your personal data in compliance with the Brazilian General Data Protection Law (LGPD – Law No. 13,709/2018).
By using our Platform, you consent to the practices described in this Policy. We recommend reading the entire document carefully.

subsections.title: 2.1. Data provided by the user
content: We may collect the following data when you sign up or use the Platform:
list: Full name
Email address
Profile information (photo, display name)
Payment data (processed by third-party payment gateways)
Prompts (text commands) entered for content generation

subsections.title: 2.2. Data collected automatically
content: When you access the Platform, we automatically collect:
list: IP address and approximate geolocation data
Browser type, operating system, and device used
Pages visited, access time, and interactions with the Platform
Cookies and similar tracking technologies
Service usage data (type and quantity of generations performed)

subsections.title: 2.3. Third-party data
content: If you log in through third-party services (such as Google or social networks), we may receive basic profile data as authorized by the provider and by you.

sections.title: 3. Purposes of Data Processing
content: We use your personal data for the following purposes:
list: Creation and management of your account on the Platform
Provision and improvement of AI image and video generation services
Processing of payments and management of subscriptions
Sending service communications (updates, changes, security notices)
Sending marketing communications (with prior consent and opt-out option)
Usage and performance analysis of the Platform for continuous improvement
Fraud prevention and safeguarding the security of the Platform
Compliance with legal and regulatory obligations
Training and improvement of artificial intelligence models (in anonymized form)

sections.title: 4. Legal Bases for Processing
content: The processing of your personal data is based on the following legal grounds provided by the LGPD:

highlights.label: Consent
highlights.desc: when you expressly authorize the processing (e.g., marketing)

highlights.label: Legitimate interest
highlights.desc: to improve the Platform and prevent fraud

highlights.label: Compliance with legal obligation
highlights.desc: when required by law or regulation

sections.title: 5. Data Sharing
content: Your personal data may be shared with:
list: Payment service providers for processing financial transactions
Infrastructure and cloud hosting providers
Providers of artificial intelligence models used in content generation
Performance analysis and monitoring tools
Competent authorities, when required by law or court order
sections.after: We do not sell, rent, or market your personal data to third parties for marketing purposes. All partners and suppliers are subject to contractual obligations of confidentiality and data protection.

sections.title: 6. International Data Transfer
content: Your data may be transferred and stored on servers located outside Brazil, including in countries that may not have data protection laws equivalent to the LGPD. In such cases, we adopt appropriate security measures, such as standard contractual clauses, to ensure the protection of your data.

sections.title: 7. Data Storage and Security
content: We adopt appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, destruction, loss, alteration, or improper processing, including:
list: Encryption of data in transit (TLS/SSL) and at rest
Role-based access control
Continuous security monitoring
sections.after: Your personal data will be stored for the time necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, or as required by law.

sections.title: 8. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
content: The Platform uses cookies and similar technologies to:
list: Keep your session active and remember your preferences
Analyze Platform usage and improve the user experience
Personalize content and advertisements (when applicable)
sections.after: You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings. Disabling certain cookies may affect Platform functionality.

sections.title: 9. Data Subject Rights
content: In accordance with the LGPD, you have the right to:
list: Confirmation of the existence of processing of your personal data
Access to your personal data
Correction of incomplete, inaccurate, or outdated data
Anonymization, blocking, or elimination of unnecessary data or data processed in non-compliance with the LGPD
Portability of data to another service provider
Deletion of personal data processed based on consent
Information about with whom your data has been shared
Information about the possibility of not providing consent and its consequences
Revocation of consent at any time
sections.after: To exercise any of these rights, contact us through the channels available on the Platform. We will respond to your request within the legal period of 15 (fifteen) days.

sections.title: 10. Data of Minors
content: The Platform is not intended for persons under 18 (eighteen) years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal data from minors. If we become aware that data from a minor has been collected without proper consent, we will take the necessary steps to delete it.

sections.title: 11. Changes to this Policy
content: This Privacy Policy may be updated periodically to reflect changes in our practices or applicable law. The updated version will be published on the Platform with the date of the last modification. We recommend reviewing this document periodically.
